overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a riverside path toward a massive ruined brick aqueduct, ascending wooden stairs through the ruins, and exploring a military camp with checkered tents and NPCs. The scene transitions from open waterfront to enclosed stairways and finally to a bustling camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside dirt path approaching ruined aqueduct

events.description: approaching an armored NPC standing in the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path beside the river, approaching the ruined aqueduct and a group of NPCs ahead

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing in the middle of the path facing the approaching player

entered.detail: massive red brick bridge structure with large arches spanning across the river
narrow dirt trail running alongside the riverbank
calm river water reflecting the sky
steep earthen cliff with grass and exposed rock

segments.scene_description: Walking along a dirt path beside a river, with a massive ruined brick aqueduct dominating the view ahead. The path is bordered by a rocky cliff on the left and the river on the right. An armored NPC stands ahead on the path, and several figures are visible resting near the water's edge.

events.description: transitioning from dirt path to wooden dock walkway beneath the aqueduct structure
passing by the armored NPC and approaching the wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock area, passing by moored boats and a horse, approaching the wooden staircase

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the base of the wooden stairs

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a dock and walkway along the river
small wooden rowboats moored along the riverbank
brown horse standing on the dock near the boats
steep wooden staircase built into the ruined structure

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from dirt to wooden planks as the character walks beneath the ruined aqueduct. Passing wooden boats moored along the riverbank and a horse standing on the dock. The environment becomes partially shaded by the overhead brick structure as the character approaches a wooden staircase guarded by an armored NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden staircase through ruined brick walls

events.description: beginning to ascend the steep wooden stairs through the ruined structure
approaching the wooden gate at the top of the stairs, transitioning to open camp area

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep wooden stairs through the interior of the ruined brick structure, passing under scaffolding and support beams

entered.detail: steep wooden staircase with railings built against the ruined walls
weathered red brick walls with crumbling mortar and vegetation growth
rough wooden beams and planks supporting the structure
large wooden palisade gate at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: Ascending a steep wooden staircase built through the interior of the ruined brick structure. The environment is narrow and enclosed with weathered brick walls on both sides and wooden scaffolding overhead. The lighting becomes dappled and shaded as the character climbs toward a wooden gate at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: military camp with tents and campfires

events.description: passing through the wooden gate into the open military camp area
walking past campfires and through the center of the camp

agents.ego_description: walking through the busy military camp, passing between checkered tents and NPCs sitting by campfires, heading toward the central ruined tower

notable_agents.action: civilian in brown coat walking ahead toward the ruined tower

entered.detail: tall ruined brick tower with arched windows and ivy growth, serving as the camp's central landmark
military tents with black and yellow diamond pattern fabric
burning campfires with NPCs gathered around them
rough wooden fences and barriers defining camp boundaries

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs through a wooden gate into an open military camp. The area features checkered tents, campfires with sitting NPCs, and a large ruined tower in the center. The character walks through the camp among various soldiers and civilians, passing by cooking fires and supply crates.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp area with surrounding ruins

events.description: stopping forward movement and turning to survey the camp surroundings
camera pans toward the sun creating a lens flare effect

agents.ego_description: stopping and turning around to look at different parts of the camp, surveying the ruins and tents from various angles

segments.scene_description: The character stops and turns around, panning the camera to survey the camp. The sun becomes visible in the sky creating a bright flare, illuminating the checkered tents and ruined walls. The camera turns to show different angles of the camp interior and the surrounding ruined structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open riverside path into the enclosed ruins of a brick aqueduct, finally emerging into a bustling military camp. It begins along a dirt path between a rocky cliff and a river, moving toward a massive ruined brick structure while passing armored guards and figures resting by the water. As the terrain shifts to wooden planks, the camera glides beneath the overhead brickwork past moored boats and a horse on the dock before turning upward to ascend a steep, narrow wooden staircase. The environment becomes enclosed by weathered brick walls and scaffolding until the camera passes through a wooden gate, opening into a wide camp filled with checkered tents, campfires, and a central ruined tower. Finally, the character stops and pans the camera around the camp, catching a bright sun flare that illuminates the soldiers, supply crates, and surrounding ruins.
